name: makelaar-mcp
description_en: Lets an AI assistant search Funda listings and run NHG, NIBUD, mortgage, and closing-cost calculations.

name: kadaster-mcp
description_en: Lets an AI assistant query the Kadaster Knowledge Graph of Dutch land-registry data.

name: mcp-monumenten
description_en: Lets an AI assistant look up Dutch monument status from BAG, RCE, and municipal sources.

name: pyfunda
description_en: Lets a script or agent query Funda home listings, prices, and price history via its mobile API.
